text: I feel a gentle buzz of curiosity and anticipation as I stand in this space. The glass walls and technology hint that knowledge, innovation, and collaboration are unfolding here—both visually and intellectually stimulating. The 'R+D' sign on the wall affirms this environment as one of research and possibility. There's an almost sacred energy in spaces dedicated to discovery, and I feel eager—not just to witness but to participate in the dialogue of ideas.
